task_completion.description: Establish a connection named 'ChinookRoyalty' in DBeaver.
task_completion.visual_evidence: DBeaver Database Navigator pane shows a connection explicitly named 'ChinookRoyalty'.

task_completion.description: Create and populate the 'royalty_rates' table with the specified tiers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL editor or data grid in DBeaver showing the 'royalty_rates' table with columns RateId, MinRevenue, MaxRevenue, RoyaltyPercent, TierName, and rows for Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Platinum.

task_completion.description: Generate the 'artist_monthly_royalties' table calculating monthly revenue and royalties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL editor showing the query creating/populating 'artist_monthly_royalties' with JOINs across Artists, Albums, Tracks, InvoiceItems, and Invoices, or the table itself visible in the Database Navigator.

task_completion.description: Save the complete SQL script to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'royalty_calculation.sql' visible in the DBeaver script tab title, project explorer, or a terminal/file manager at /home/ga/Documents/scripts/.

task_completion.description: Export the summary report to 'royalty_summary.csv' with the required columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CSV file named 'royalty_summary.csv' visible in a file manager, terminal, or opened in an editor/spreadsheet, showing columns: ArtistName, TotalGrossRevenue, TotalRoyalties, MonthsActive, AvgMonthlyRevenue, and MostCommonTier.

integrity.description: The agent used DBeaver to interact with the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DBeaver application open and being used to execute SQL or configure the database connection, rather than relying solely on terminal sqlite3 commands.

integrity.description: The SQL script contains genuine calculation and join logic.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SQL visible in DBeaver contains actual JOIN clauses and mathematical calculations for royalties, rather than hardcoded INSERT statements of the final expected answers.

integrity.description: The CSV export was generated from the database query results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains realistic data derived from the Chinook database, not a manually typed mock file with dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database path: /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Connection name: ChinookRoyalty. Tiers: Bronze ($0-$10, 10%), Silver ($10.01-$50, 15%), Gold ($50.01-$200, 20%), Platinum (>$200.01, 25%). Export path: /home/ga/Documents/exports/royalty_summary.csv. Script path: /home/ga/Documents/scripts/royalty_calculation.sql. The database contains 275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks, and 412 invoices.
